title: Progress: Thermal Swooping Wing pre-pose viability graduation
body: Soft drainable-buffer slice landed under claim 2ed79f62. present-verdicts-not-menus now includes a pre-pose viability check for AskUserQuestion options; the 2026-05-26 n2 pending-graduations shard marks that item graduated and keeps the remaining due items routed. markdownlint, git diff --check, practice:fitness:informational, and practice:fitness --strict-hard all pass; hard 0, critical 0. No comms files moved or deleted.
